_description: System health snapshot for Rinq. Updated by memory-updater agent at end of sessions.
_notes: 2026-04-20: Eleven commits. Warm-transfer handoff correctness (endConferenceOnExit restore + server-side forced participant removal). Server-authoritative consult-UI morph; Agent 2 no longer sees Go back/Hand off. Removed participant-card mute/hold (moderator features don't fit phone UX). Whisper voicemail transcription inline with Zendesk attachment (OPENAI_API_KEY). Loud mute/hold warning banners after Hazel's accidental-mute incident. Hotfix for toggleMute crash referencing removed #btnMute DOM.

recent_commits: b01cafe feat: hold warning banner mirrors mute banner
a544e52 feat: unmissable mute warning banner
cd92e80 refactor: remove mute/hold from participant cards
2bb0342 fix: only show consult controls to initiating agent
50a490a fix: forcibly remove initiating agent from conference on handoff
1bf4608 feat: morph call controls row between idle and consult states
d802f57 fix: end conference when post-handoff party hangs up
f55f398 fix: toggleMute crash referencing removed DOM

migrations.notes: 073 adds transfer_failure_reason TEXT to queued_calls and call_log. 072 enables voicemail escape defaults on existing queues.

watson.notes: Production. Address book synced from Peter daily 2am.

derek.notes: Personal/test. Address book sync no-ops (no Peter).

whisper.notes: Global key across tenants. Per-tenant key deferred.

tests.notes: Manual test focus for 2026-04-20 changes: warm transfer handoff (initiating agent actually leaves, customer can't be kicked by Agent 2), consult-UI morph (Agent 1 sees Go back/Hand off, Agent 2 sees normal controls), mute/hold warning banners, Whisper transcript appearing in Zendesk ticket body.

pending_operations: 2026-04-20: Audit blind transfer + 3-way extension flows for endConferenceOnExit restore bug.
2026-04-20: Monitor for more accidental-mute reports; consider Mute button placement if banner insufficient.
2026-04-17: Sandrene to uninstall + re-pin Chromebox app to pick up 'Tina Phone' manifest name.
2026-04-17: Clean up draftcal friendly_name ('Watson Blinds') and audit other users.
2026-04-16: Watson team to record and upload Voicemail Escape audio in Audio Manager.
2026-04-16: Add ELEVENLABS_API_KEY to /var/www/rinq/.env if ElevenLabs TTS needed.
known_issues: Queue-answer early-click race (user clicks Answer before queue poll refreshes) — falls back to 'Caller no longer in queue' error
Press-1 DTMF for queue voicemail escape can fail on some mobile networks (Twilio reports QueueResult=hangup)
Whisper hallucinates on silence (e.g. 'Thanks for watching') — short/silent voicemails may get nonsense transcripts
Missed-call attribution on inbound agent table — impossible without ring_attempts (purges after 24h); Missed column dropped from UI
Consult-status callback runs _unhold_and_rejoin_agent salvage even after clean Cancel (transfer_status='cancelled') — noisy but harmless
phone.html ~5,100 lines with 109 inline JS functions — refactor deferred
api/routes.py ~5,100 lines — deeper service extraction deferred until automated tests exist
database/db.py 3,528 lines — more mixin extractions possible (recordings, staff, participants, queues)
transfer_service.py has ~400 lines of duplication between queue-based and universal transfer methods
7 bare except clauses in transfer_service.py — should at minimum log at debug
No automated tests — all testing via /admin/test-runsheet
DND + empty queue hangs up instead of falling through to voicemail
Internal caller ID shows extension number, not agent name
Transfer modal doesn't auto-close when target answers
Call-ended vs not-answered distinction wrong for conference hangups
'On call' status lingers ~5-10s after transfer (Twilio cache lag)
Voicemail offered even when no destination configured
Per-tenant Twilio config: creds still in .env, should move to tenant-only
Per-tenant OpenAI API key: global key only for now
Watson tenant uses master Twilio account, should migrate to subaccount
Static files (ringback, hold music) not in git — copied manually during deployment
show_in_pam is a legacy Peter-only flag — column still exists and is read by /staff-phones
queue_connect_agent endpoint (~line 2136 routes.py) still uses <Dial><Queue> not conference-based — investigate if legacy/unused
